markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.080 — Insurance Binder

A binder issued pending the issuance of a motor vehicle liability insurance policy satisfies the requirements for such a policy.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A binder issued pending the issuance of a motor vehicle liability insurance policy satisfies the requirements for such a policy.
